stemHtml: You are established on the localiser and are tracking correctly, with the course deviation bar centred. However, your flight directors (FDs) are indicating a sharp turn to the left. What should you do?

options.a: Switch off the FDs and follow the localiser manually.
options.b: Disconnect the autopilot and follow the FDs.
options.c: De-tune the ILS frequencies and follow the FDs.
options.d: Follow the FDs and ignore the localiser indications.
